nasb.text: The vision of the evenings and mornings Which has been told is true; But keep the vision secret, For it pertains to many days in the future.”

esv.text: The vision of the evenings and the mornings that has been told is true, but seal up the vision, for it refers to many days from now.”

cnv.text: 關於所說二千三百個晚上和早晨的異象是真的， 但你要把這異象封住， 因為那是關於將來許多的年日的。”

ccb.text: 异象中所说的两千三百个昼夜是真的。但你要保密，不可告诉别人，因为这指的是遥远的将来。”
